description_long: This wall-mounted sconce features a wooden backplate with a rich, natural grain and a shield-like shape, providing a rustic and sturdy appearance. The central fixture is a black metal bracket that extends outward, supporting a single candle-shaped light bulb with a cream-colored base. The bulb is designed to mimic the look of a traditional candle flame, adding a vintage touch to the overall design. The metal bracket has a simple, utilitarian form, contrasting with the warm tones and texture of the wood. The backplate is flat and wide, ensuring stable mounting against a wall, while the sconce's components are proportioned for both decorative and functional lighting. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A rustic wall-mounted sconce with a wooden shield-shaped backplate, black metal bracket, and a single candle-style bulb. The design blends vintage charm with sturdy, functional materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full wooden backplate, central candle-style bulb, and black metal bracket.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding metal bracket and the depth of the wooden backplate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the entire wooden backplate with mounting area, no bulb or bracket visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bracket's curve and the candle-style bulb's profile.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a rustic and vintage design, featuring a wooden shield-shaped backplate and a simple black metal bracket. The candle-style bulb adds a traditional, old-world charm.
